name: node-object-assign
title: node-object-assign
description:
ES2015 Object.assign() ponyfill
Assigns enumerable own properties of source objects to the target object and
returns the target object. Additional source objects will overwrite previous
ones.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-object-assign because ES2015 Object.assign() ponyfill.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-object-assign as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-object-assign with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-object-assign --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
